generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier and type errors reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid helper declarations within AGREE clauses.
Avoid introducing identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model or its dependencies.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure helper declarations have types consistent with their usage in expressions.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to directly use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
Avoid adding architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on fixing the contract itself.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope rules for annex placement
